scripts.build: pnpm --filter trellis-hermes-core build && pnpm --filter trellis-hermes build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter trellis-hermes-core test && pnpm run test:cli
scripts.test:cli: pnpm --filter trellis-hermes-core build && pnpm --filter trellis-hermes test
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter trellis-hermes-core lint && pnpm --filter trellis-hermes lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter trellis-hermes-core build && pnpm --filter trellis-hermes typecheck
